recommendations.title: Prison Break: The Final Break
recommendations.overview: Michael and Sara wed, but the happiness is short-lived when the Feds apprehend her for the murder of Michael's mother, Christina. Once a hit is ordered on Sara, the team reunite to break out the increasingly vulnerable target.

recommendations.title: Species III

recommendations.title: Black Lotus
recommendations.overview: An ex-special forces operative wages a one man war through the streets of Amsterdam to rescue his friend's daughter from the local crime syndicate.

recommendations.title: Furious 7
recommendations.overview: Deckard Shaw seeks revenge against Dominic Toretto and his family for his comatose brother.

recommendations.title: Sherlock: The Abominable Bride
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson find themselves in 1890s London in this holiday special.

recommendations.title: Goldfinger
recommendations.overview: Special agent 007 comes face to face with one of the most notorious villains of all time, and now he must outwit and outgun the powerful tycoon to prevent him from cashing in on a devious scheme to raid Fort Knox -- and obliterate the world's economy

recommendations.title: Interview with a Hitman
recommendations.overview: An elite hitman returns to erase his past only to find that somebody has messed with his future.

recommendations.title: MR-9: Do or Die
recommendations.overview: Elite Bangladeshi CIA agent Masud Rana – codename MR-9 – teams up with an American CIA operative to bring down an international criminal organization headed by a ruthless businessman.
